parameters.query: SELECT conv.id, c.ghl_contact_id, c.name, c.phone, c.email, c.company, c.tags, c.source, c.owner, conv.channel, conv.status, conv.starred, conv.unread_count, conv.last_message, conv.last_direction, conv.last_status, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM conv.last_message_at)*1000 AS last_message_at, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM conv.last_inbound)*1000 AS last_inbound FROM conversations conv JOIN contacts c ON c.id = conv.contact_id ORDER BY conv.last_message_at DESC NULLS LAST;
